title: ranunculus aurosulus
intro: Ranunculus aurosulus, also known as gold buttercup, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is native to Europe and Western Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving pain, and has been used to treat various conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Ranunculus aurosulus typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
